    A

    activate() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.Trigger
    Activates this trigger.
    actualScreenAspectRatio - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The aspect ratio of the physical screen displaying the window
    actualScreenBounds - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The dimensions of the physical screen displaying the window (in pixels)
    actualScreenHeight - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The height of the physical screen displaying the window (in pixels)
    actualScreenWidth - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The width of the physical screen displaying the window (in pixels)
    addAlert(Alert) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUIManager
    Adds the given alert to the list of active alerts.
    addOptionalParameter(String, Parameter<?>) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.WidgetBuilder
    Adds an optional widget parameter.
    addRequiredParameter(String, Parameter<?>) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.WidgetBuilder
    Adds a required widget parameter.
    addWidget(Widget) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Adds the given widget as a child widget of this component.
    addWidget(Widget) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUI
    Adds the given widget to this GUI.
    Alert - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core
    Defines the contract for an alert that can be rendered and updated within a GUI context.
    Alert() - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Alert
     
    anchor - Variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.WidgetBuilder
    The point on the widget anchored to the coordinates (required)
    AnchorParameter - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters
    Overrides the AnchorParameter.parse(String) method to map the String representation to a Widget.Anchor value and stores it.
    AnchorParameter() - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.AnchorParameter
     
    App - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app
    Stores application appearance.

    B

    background() - Method in record class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.ColorProfile
    Returns the value of the background record component.
    base() - Method in record class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.ColorSet
    Returns the value of the base record component.
    BasicPanel - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window
    Represents a basic JPanel instance linked to a JFrame object.
    BasicWindow - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window
    Stores basic properties for a window to be displayed.
    BasicWindow(String, Image, boolean, boolean, int, int, int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.BasicWindow
    Constructs a basic window to be displayed.
    bottom(int, int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-center point lies at the given coordinates.
    BOTTOM - Enum constant in enum class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget.Anchor
    The bottom-center point
    BOTTOM_LEFT - Enum constant in enum class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget.Anchor
    The bottom-left corner
    BOTTOM_RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget.Anchor
    The bottom-right corner
    bottomLeft(int, int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-left corner lies at the given coordinates.
    bottomRight(int, int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-right corner lies at the given coordinates.
    brighter() - Method in record class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.ColorSet
    Returns the value of the brighter record component.
    build() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.WidgetBuilder
    Builds a Widget using the stored parameter values.
    buildComponent() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.ImageComponent.ImageComponentBuilder
    Builds an ImageComponent with the stored image and dimensions.
    buildComponent() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.TextComponent.TextComponentBuilder
    Builds a TextComponent with the stored text, text color, and font size.
    buildComponent() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.WidgetBuilder
    Override this method to provide the component building logic using the stored parameters.

    C

    center() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns a widget containing this component centered at the center of the screen.
    center(int, int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns a widget containing this component centered at the given coordinates.
    CENTER - Enum constant in enum class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget.Anchor
    The center point

    Registers a click on this trigger.

    Overrides the ColorParameter.parse(String) method to parse a hexadecimal color value or individual RGB values.

    Creates an instance of a ColorProfile record class.

    Stores a set of colors derived from a base color.

    Creates an instance of a ColorSet record class.
    Component - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core
    Represents a base GUI component within the GUI framework.
    Component() - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Constructs a component with zero dimensions.
    Component(int, int) - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Constructs a component with the given width and height.
    contains(int, int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns whether the given coordinates lie within the boundaries of this component.

    Crosshair cursor
    Cursors - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.constants

    D

    darker() - Method in record class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.ColorSet
    Returns the value of the darker record component.

    Deactivates this trigger.
    DEFAULT - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.constants.Cursors
    Default cursor
    destroy() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Alert
    Removes this alert from its parent list if it has one.
    disableInput() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUI
    Disables input events for every widget in this GUI.
    disableInput(Widget) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUI
    Disables input events for every widget in this GUI, with an exception.

    E

    enableInput() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUI
    Enables input events for every widget in this GUI.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.ColorProfile
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.ColorSet
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    error() - Method in record class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.ColorProfile
    Returns the value of the error record component.

    F

    FloatParameter - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers
    Represents a number parameter for Float values.
    FloatParameter() - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers.FloatParameter
    Constructs a number parameter for floating-point numbers with the parser function Float.parseFloat(String).
    fromResources(String) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.ImageComponent
    Reads the image file at the given path in the resources folder and returns an image component displaying it.
    fromResources(String, int, int) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.ImageComponent
    Reads the image file at the given path in the resources folder and returns an image component displaying it, resized to the given dimensions.
    FullScreenWindow - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window
    Provides a simplified constructor for a full-screen window.
    FullScreenWindow(String, Image, int, int) - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.FullScreenWindow
    Constructs a basic window to be displayed.

    G

    get() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.Parameter
    Returns the non-null value of this parameter.
    get(MouseEvent) - Static method in enum class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.MouseButton
    Returns the interacted mouse button based on the given mouse event.
    get(String) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.Translator
    Returns the translated text for the given translation key.
    get(String) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.WidgetBuilderRegistry
    Returns an Optional containing a new WidgetBuilder instance for the given component type, or an empty Optional if the given component type is not registered, or if the corresponding supplier returns an empty Optional.
    getChildWidgets() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns the list of child widgets of this component.
    getColor() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.TextComponent
    Returns the color of the displayed text.
    getColorProfile() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.App
    Returns the current color profile of the application.
    getComponent() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget
    Returns the component contained in this widget.
    getCurrentGUI() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUIManager
    Returns the current GUI.
    getCursor() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUIManager
    Returns the current mouse cursor.
    getCustomCursor(String, String, float, float) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.constants.Cursors
    Returns a new custom cursor with the given parameters.
    getFont() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.TextComponent
    Returns the font of the displayed text.
    getFont(float) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.App
    Returns the current text font of the application with the given font size.
    getFontMetrics() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.TextComponent
    Returns the font metrics for the font of the displayed text.
    getGUI() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget
    Returns the GUI that contains this widget.
    getHeight() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns the height of this component.
    getImage() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.ImageComponent
    Returns the displayed image.
    getLayerIndex() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget
    Returns the layer index of this widget, which dictates which widget is rendered on top and receives the input events first.
    getMouseButtonAction(MouseButton) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.Trigger
    Returns an Optional containing the action that is run when the given mouse button is clicked, or an empty Optional if no action is run.
    getMouseX() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.MouseInputListener
    Returns the x-coordinate of the mouse cursor on the virtual screen.
    getMouseY() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.MouseInputListener
    Returns the y-coordinate of the mouse cursor on the virtual screen.
    getOffsetX() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns the rendering offset for this component on the x-axis.
    getOffsetY() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns the rendering offset for this component on the y-axis.
    getOptional() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.Parameter
    Returns an Optional containing the non-null value of this parameter, or an empty Optional if this parameter does not have a set value.
    getOverlay() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUIManager
    Returns an Optional containing the current overlay, or an empty Optional if there is currently no overlay.
    getSpecialCursor() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.Trigger
    Returns the cursor that is shown when hovering over this trigger.
    getText() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.TextComponent
    Returns the displayed text.
    getWidget() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns the widget that contains this component.
    getWidget(Component, int, int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.AnchorParameter
    Returns the right Widget based on the stored Widget.Anchor value.
    getWidgets() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUI
    Returns the list of widgets contained in this GUI.
    getWidth() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns the width of this component.
    getX() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget
    Returns the x-coordinate of the top-left corner of this widget.
    getY() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget
    Returns the y-coordinate of the top-left corner of this widget.
    graphicsConfiguration - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The default graphics configuration for the local graphics environment
    grayscale() - Method in record class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.ColorSet
    Returns the value of the grayscale record component.
    GUI - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core
    Represents a base GUI within the GUI framework.
    GUI() - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUI
     
    GUILoader - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader
    This utility class provides the static method GUILoader.load(String) to load and parse a GUI file from resources.
    GUIManager - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core
    Manages switching GUIs, global overlays, alerts, and global key binds.

    Constructs an ImageComponent builder.

    isActive() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.Trigger

    isClipped() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Returns whether the rendering context is clipped to the bounding box when rendering this component.
    isEmpty() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.Parameter
    Returns whether this parameter does not have a set value.
    isHovered() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.Trigger

    isInputEnabled() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUI
    Returns whether input events are enabled.
    isPresent() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.Parameter
    Returns whether this parameter has a set value.
    isVisible() - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget
    Returns whether this widget is visible.

    M

    Main - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.main

    Override this method to handle a mouse click event.
    mouseClickEvent(int, int, MouseButton) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.Trigger
    If the clicked coordinates lie on this trigger, calls Trigger.click(io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.MouseButton) with the clicked mouse button.
    mouseDragEvent(int, int, MouseButton) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Override this method to handle a mouse drag event.

    Override this method to handle a mouse move event.
    mouseMoveEvent(int, int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.Trigger
    Updates whether the mouse cursor is hovering over this trigger.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.MouseInputListener

    Override this method to handle a mouse press event.

    Override this method to handle a mouse release event.
    mouseWheelEvent(MouseWheelEvent) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Override this method to handle a mouse wheel move event.

    Moves the mouse cursor to the given location on the screen.

    N

    negative() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers.FloatParameter
    Returns a new FloatParameter instance that is only allowed to store negative values.
    negative() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers.IntegerParameter
    Returns a new IntegerParameter instance that is only allowed to store negative values.
    NONE - Enum constant in enum class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.MouseButton
    No mouse button
    notNegative() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers.FloatParameter
    Returns a new FloatParameter instance that is only allowed to store non-negative values.
    notNegative() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers.IntegerParameter
    Returns a new IntegerParameter instance that is only allowed to store non-negative values.
    notPositive() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers.FloatParameter
    Returns a new FloatParameter instance that is only allowed to store non-positive values.
    notPositive() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers.IntegerParameter
    Returns a new IntegerParameter instance that is only allowed to store non-positive values.
    NumberParameter<T> - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters
    Defines the contract for a parameter which contains comparable numbers.
    NumberParameter(Function<String, T>) - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.NumberParameter
    Constructs a number parameter that uses the given parser function to parse the String representation of numbers.

    O

    of(Color, boolean) - Static method in record class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.ColorSet
    Constructs a color set derived from the given base color.

    Override this method to provide logic that is run on the compilation of this GUI.
    OTHER - Enum constant in enum class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.MouseButton
    Other mouse buttons
    others() - Method in record class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.ColorProfile
    Returns the value of the others record component.
    Overlay - Interface in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core
    Defines the contract for an overlay that can be rendered and updated within a GUI context.

    P

    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.BasicPanel
    Uses GUIManager.render(Graphics2D) to render a frame on the virtual screen buffer, and draws the virtual screen buffer onto the displayed window.
    Parameter<T> - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader
    Represents a parameter in a GUI file.
    Parameter() - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.Parameter
     
    parse(String) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.Parameter
    Parses the given String representation and returns the corresponding generic parameter value.
    parse(String) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.AnchorParameter
    Parses the given String representation of an anchor point.

    Parses the given String representation of a color.

    Reads the image at the given path relative to the resources folder.

    Parses the given String representation of a number using the stored parser function.

    Removes surrounding whitespace, and a single pair of surrounding quotation marks (if present) from the text.

    Parses the given String representation and sets the parsed value as the new value of this parameter.

    Returns the value of the placeholderText record component.

    Returns a new FloatParameter instance that is only allowed to store positive values.
    positive() - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers.IntegerParameter

    Sets the minimum and maximum allowed values for this parameter.
    setClipped(boolean) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Sets whether the rendering context is clipped to the bounding box when rendering this component.
    setColor(Color) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.TextComponent
    Sets the color of the displayed text to the given color.

    Sets the color profile of the application to the given color profile.

    Sets the text font of the application to the given text font.
    setFont(Font) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.TextComponent
    Sets the font of the displayed text to the given font.
    setGlobalKeyBind(char, Runnable) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUIManager
    Sets a global key bind.
    setGUI(GUI) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUIManager
    Sets the given GUI as the current GUI.
    setGUI(String) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUIManager
    Loads and sets the GUI from the GUI file at the given path relative to the resources folder.

    Uses the given supplier to set the current GUI.
    setHeight(int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Sets the height of this component to the given value and updates the bounding box.
    setHeight(int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.ImageComponent
     
    setImage(BufferedImage) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.ImageComponent
    Sets the displayed image.
    setLanguage(String, String) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.app.Translator
    Sets the language based on the given language code.
    setLayerIndex(int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget
    Sets the layer index of this widget, which dictates which widget is rendered on top and receives the input events first.
    setMaximumValue(T) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.NumberParameter
    Sets the maximum allowed value for this parameter.
    setMinimumValue(T) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.NumberParameter
    Sets the minimum allowed value for this parameter.
    setMouseButtonAction(MouseButton, Runnable) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.Trigger
    Sets the action that is run when the given mouse button is clicked.
    setOffsetX(int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Sets the rendering offset for this component on the x-axis.
    setOffsetY(int) - Method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
    Sets the rendering offset for this component on the y-axis.
    setOverlay(Overlay) - Static method in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUIManager
    Sets the overlay to the given overlay.

    Sets the panel that holds the GUI manager.

    Sets the mouse cursor that is shown when hovering over this trigger.

    Sets the displayed text to the given text.

    Sets the width of this component to the given value and updates the bounding box.

    Starts the main rendering and update loop on a new thread.
    StringParameter - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters
    Overrides the StringParameter.parse(String) method to remove a single pair of surrounding quotation marks (if present) from the given String value using the public static method StringParameter.stripQuotationMarks(String).

    Returns the value of the success record component.

    W

    Widget - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core
    Represents a displayable widget that contains a Component object.
    Widget(Component, int, int, Widget.Anchor) - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Widget
    Constructs a widget that contains the given component and is anchored to the given point on the screen.
    Widget.Anchor - Enum Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core
    Represents anchor points on a widget.
    WidgetBuilder - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader
    Stores lists of required and optional widget parameters as Parameter instances.
    WidgetBuilder() - Constructor for class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.WidgetBuilder
    Adds the default required parameters x, y, and anchor; and the optional parameter layer.
    WidgetBuilderRegistry - Class in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader
    This registry class statically registers new instance suppliers for WidgetBuilder subclasses annotated with RegisterWidgetBuilder into a Map using ClassGraph.
    windowHeight - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The height of the displayed window (in pixels)
    windowToVirtualRatioX - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The ratio of the window width to the virtual screen width
    windowToVirtualRatioY - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The ratio of the window height to the virtual screen height
    windowWidth - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The width of the displayed window (in pixels)

    X

    x - Variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.WidgetBuilder
    The x-coordinate of the widget anchor point (required)
    xCenter - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The x-coordinate of the virtual screen center (helper value)

    Y

    y - Variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.WidgetBuilder
    The y-coordinate of the widget anchor point (required)
    yCenter - Static variable in class io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.window.ScreenConfig
    The y-coordinate of the virtual screen center (helper value)
